name: asx-trade-finder
description: ASX Trade Finder monorepo root. Frontend lives in ./frontend and backend lives in ./src.

scripts.dev: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run dev
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build
scripts.start: cd frontend && if [ ! -d node_modules ]; then npm ci; fi && if [ ! -d dist ]; then npm run build; fi && npm run preview -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-10000}
